payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS CarMakerCount FROM car_makers cm JOIN countries co ON cm.Country = co.CountryId JOIN continents c ON co.Continent = c.ContId GROUP BY c.Continent;'}

inputs.sql: SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS CarMakerCount FROM car_makers cm JOIN countries co ON cm.Country = co.CountryId JOIN continents c ON co.Continent = c.ContId GROUP BY c.Continent;

payload.result: content='{"ok": true, "row_count": 3, "columns": ["Continent", "CarMakerCount"], "preview_rows": [["america", 4], ["asia", 7], ["europe", 11]], "dtypes": {"Continent": "str", "CarMakerCount": "int"}, "executed_sql": "SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS CarMakerCount FROM car_makers cm JOIN countries co ON cm.Country = co.CountryId JOIN continents c ON co.Continent = c.ContId GROUP BY c.Continent;"}' name='execute_sql' id='0b63b076-ff5c-4de6-ab7d-44a5291edc52' tool_call_id='UtJbC5czH'

final.final_sql: SELECT c.Continent, COUNT(DISTINCT cm.Id) AS CarMakerCount FROM car_makers cm JOIN countries co ON cm.Country = co.CountryId JOIN continents c ON co.Continent = c.ContId GROUP BY c.Continent;
final.answer_text: There are 4 car makers in America, 7 in Asia, and 11 in Europe.
